About Us

Our story and values

📕 Our History

Founded in 2010, Taste of Home began as a small family business in Quezon City. Starting with traditional Filipino recipes passed down through generations, we've grown into a beloved food company serving authentic cuisine to families across the Philippines.

🎯 Our Mission

To deliver authentic Filipino food with exceptional quality, bringing traditional recipes to every Filipino family while maintaining modern quality standards.

👍 Our Vision

To become the leading Filipino food company recognized for authenticity and customer satisfaction, bringing the taste of home to Filipinos everywhere.

💪 Our Motto

"Lasa ng Tahanan, Kalidad ng Pamilya" - Taste of Home, Quality for Family. Every meal tells our story.

Company Profile

📢 About Taste of Home

Taste of Home is a premier Filipino food company committed to preserving and sharing authentic Filipino culinary traditions. With over 15 years of experience, we pride ourselves on using only the finest ingredients and time-honored cooking methods to deliver exceptional Filipino cuisine to our valued customers.

📍 Our Location

Delos Reyes Street
Sampaloc, Manila, Philippines

Our History, Mission & Vision

📕 History

Founded 1913 UM History On October 5, 1913, a group of four young men and a woman, with ages from fifteen to twenty-one, met for breakfast at the Palma de Mallorca, a popular restaurant beside the Sto. Domingo Church in Intramuros, Manila. The five were Dr. Apolinario G. de los Santos, his brother Dr. Mariano V. de los Santos, his sister Maria de los Santos, and two friends Dr. Buenaventura J. Bello and Atty. Antonio Rivero. These impecunious young people encountered many challenges in realizing their dream of establishing an institution whose motto was "Patria, Scientia, et Virtus." They named their school Instituto de Manila, and Apolinario de los Santos was elected as the first director.

🎯 Mission

ACE — to accomplish something with complete success.

A - Anchor in the hearts of the youth the love of country, science, and virtue.

C - Create an atmosphere of academic excellence and competence.

E - Empower the youth with modern scientific and technological skills in braving the challenges of the global society.

👍 Vision

"To impart to future generations the University of Manila trilogy of ideals: love of country, love of science, and love of virtue, in making the lives of others better, brighter, lighter and more liveable by making quality education accessible to all."

💪 Motto

"To acquire knowledge and skills for the benefit of mankind."

Key Milestones

1985

School Founded

The University Of Manila was established to provide quality education to the community.

1913

Instituto de Manila

Instituto de Manila founded by five young visionaries in Intramuros.

1919

College of Law

College of Law formally opened; graduates top the Bar Examinations.

1981

Dr. Virgilio de los Santos

Dr. Virgilio de los Santos assumes presidency; receives Japan's Rising Sun Medal of Honor.

1994

Computer Science

Four-year courses in Hotel & Restaurant Management and Computer Science launched.

2006

Emily Dodson De Leon

Dr. Emily Dodson De Leon elected President; becomes PACU's first Vice-President in 2007.

Our School Hymn

The UM Hymn-U.M. Forever

Verse 1:

U.MI oh, U.M forever Alma mater, dear, we hail!
We'll always wave your banner
With the glorious U.M so dear As faithful sons, of dear U.M
We will honor you forever, We'll cheer for you, Always love you Onward U.M ever hail!

College Mission, Vision & Motto

📚 Our History

Welcome to the College of Computer Science and Information Technology of The University of Manila. Faculty members maintain active programs of research and publication in computer vision, programming languages, machine learning, databases, modeling and simulation, and the theory of computation. We offer academic programs leading to the degree of Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Associate in Computer Technology.

🎯 Mission

Provide quality undergraduate and graduate education in both the theoretical and applied foundations of computer science and train students to effectively apply this education to solve real-world problems, amplifying their potential for lifelong high-quality careers and giving them a competitive advantage in the ever-changing and challenging global work environment of the 21st century.

👍 Vision

Build a strong research and teaching environment that responds swiftly to the challenges of the 21st century.

💪 Motto

"Code with Purpose, Lead with Vision" - We teach computer science as a tool for positive change and leadership in the digital age.

Interactive Code Examples

1. Add Numbers

function codeAdd() { const a = Number(document.getElementById('addA').value); const b = Number(document.getElementById('addB').value); document.getElementById('addResult').textContent = a + b; }

2. Subtract

function codeSubtract() { const a = Number(document.getElementById('subA').value); const b = Number(document.getElementById('subB').value); document.getElementById('subResult').textContent = a - b; }

3. Multiply

function codeMultiply() { const a = Number(document.getElementById('mulA').value); const b = Number(document.getElementById('mulB').value); document.getElementById('mulResult').textContent = a * b; }

4. Divide

function codeDivide() { const a = Number(document.getElementById('divA').value); const b = Number(document.getElementById('divB').value); document.getElementById('divResult').textContent = b === 0 ? 'Error: divider 0' : a / b; }

5. Calculator

function codeCalc() { const a = Number(document.getElementById('calcA').value); const b = Number(document.getElementById('calcB').value); const op = document.getElementById('calcOp').value; let result; switch (op) { case '+': result = a + b; break; case '-': result = a - b; break; case '*': result = a * b; break; case '/': result = b === 0 ? 'Error: divide by 0' : a / b; break; } document.getElementById('calcResult').textContent = result; }

6. Countdown Timer

function startCountdown() { ... } function stopCountdown() { ... }

00:00:00
